subtitle.fr: Un parcours progressif pour comprendre les reseaux cloud, pratiquer les services Google Cloud et valider tes connaissances avec des quiz.
subtitle.en: A progressive path to understand cloud networking, practice Google Cloud services, and validate knowledge with quizzes.

sourceNote.fr: Contenu structure a partir des modules et exercices vus: VPC, IAM, Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL, GKE, Cloud Run, Cloud DNS, Cloud CDN, Load Balancing, VPN, Interconnect, Network Intelligence Center, Cloud NAT, Cloud Armor, Cloud IDS et firewall policies.
sourceNote.en: Structured from the modules and exercises covered: VPC, IAM, Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL, GKE, Cloud Run, Cloud DNS, Cloud CDN, Load Balancing, VPN, Interconnect, Network Intelligence Center, Cloud NAT, Cloud Armor, Cloud IDS, and firewall policies.

goal.fr: Construire les bases: comprendre le cloud, les projets, IAM, les VPC, les sous-reseaux, les VM et les premiers services de donnees.
goal.en: Build foundations: understand cloud, projects, IAM, VPCs, subnets, VMs, and first data services.

summary.fr: Google Cloud est organise autour d'une hierarchie: organization, folders, projects et resources. Les services et API s'activent par projet. Le project ID est globalement unique, permanent et choisi a la creation. Le project number est genere par Google. IAM controle qui peut faire quoi, avec des roles basic, predefined et custom.
summary.en: Google Cloud is organized around a hierarchy: organization, folders, projects, and resources. Services and APIs are enabled per project. The project ID is globally unique, permanent, and chosen at creation. The project number is generated by Google. IAM controls who can do what through basic, predefined, and custom roles.

fr: Un projet est l'unite principale pour activer des API, isoler des ressources et suivre la facturation.
Les roles basic sont larges: Owner, Editor, Viewer. Les roles predefined sont plus precis. Les roles custom sont les plus fins.
Utilise le principe du moindre privilege: donner seulement les permissions necessaires.
Les zones donnent de la tolerance aux pannes dans une region; les regions rapprochent les applications des utilisateurs.
en: A project is the main unit for enabling APIs, isolating resources, and tracking billing.
Basic roles are broad: Owner, Editor, Viewer. Predefined roles are more specific. Custom roles are the finest grained.
Use least privilege: grant only the permissions required.
Zones improve fault tolerance inside a region; regions bring apps closer to users.

practice.fr: Dans la console, repere le Project ID, la page IAM et la page APIs & Services. Note la difference entre project name, project ID et project number.
practice.en: In the console, locate Project ID, IAM, and APIs & Services. Note the difference between project name, project ID, and project number.

fr: Dans les labs, utilise toujours les identifiants temporaires, jamais ton compte personnel.
Si la console affiche un ancien projet Qwiklabs, ferme l'onglet et rouvre depuis Open Google Cloud console.
en: In labs, always use the temporary credentials, never your personal account.
If the console shows an old Qwiklabs project, close the tab and reopen from Open Google Cloud console.

summary.fr: Un VPC Google Cloud est global, mais ses sous-reseaux sont regionaux. Chaque projet peut commencer avec un reseau default. Un reseau auto mode cree des sous-reseaux dans toutes les regions. Les routes indiquent comment le trafic quitte une VM vers un autre sous-reseau, Internet ou un next hop specifique.
summary.en: A Google Cloud VPC is global, but its subnets are regional. Each project can start with a default network. An auto mode network creates subnets in every region. Routes tell traffic how to leave a VM toward another subnet, the internet, or a specific next hop.

fr: VPC = ressource globale; subnet = ressource regionale.
Les routes systeme permettent la communication entre les sous-reseaux du meme VPC.
Sans VPC ni subnet, tu ne peux pas creer une VM connectee au reseau.
Les plages CIDR ne doivent pas se chevaucher entre sous-reseaux.
en: VPC = global resource; subnet = regional resource.
System routes allow communication between subnets in the same VPC.
Without a VPC and subnet, you cannot create a network-connected VM.
CIDR ranges must not overlap between subnets.

practice.fr: Reproduis le lab VPC: observe le reseau default, supprime les firewall rules et le VPC, puis recrée un VPC auto mode nomme mynetwork.
practice.en: Reproduce the VPC lab: observe the default network, delete firewall rules and the VPC, then recreate an auto mode VPC named mynetwork.

fr: Si un VPC ne se supprime pas, verifie qu'aucune VM, interface ou ressource ne l'utilise.
Le bouton Check my progress est dans Google Skills, pas dans la console Google Cloud.
en: If a VPC cannot be deleted, check that no VM, interface, or resource still uses it.
The Check my progress button is in Google Skills, not in Google Cloud Console.

title.fr: Compute Engine, Cloud Storage et Cloud SQL
title.en: Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, and Cloud SQL

summary.fr: Compute Engine fournit des VM. Cloud Storage fournit du stockage objet durable et hautement disponible. Cloud SQL fournit une base relationnelle managée. Pour un debutant, l'objectif est de comprendre comment une application web simple peut tourner sur une VM, lire une image depuis un bucket et se connecter a une base Cloud SQL.
summary.en: Compute Engine provides VMs. Cloud Storage provides durable and highly available object storage. Cloud SQL provides a managed relational database. For a beginner, the goal is to understand how a simple web app can run on a VM, read an image from a bucket, and connect to a Cloud SQL database.

fr: Cloud Storage n'est pas un disque root Linux; c'est du stockage objet.
Coldline reduit le cout pour les donnees rarement consultees.
Cloud SQL est relationnel classique; Spanner est relationnel distribue a tres grande echelle.
Une VM avec IP externe peut recevoir du trafic si firewall et service applicatif l'autorisent.
en: Cloud Storage is not a Linux root disk; it is object storage.
Coldline reduces cost for infrequently accessed data.
Cloud SQL is classic relational; Spanner is distributed relational at very large scale.
A VM with an external IP can receive traffic if firewall and app service allow it.

practice.fr: Cree une VM Apache/PHP, un bucket avec une image publique, puis une instance Cloud SQL MySQL. Relie l'application PHP a Cloud SQL et affiche l'image du bucket.
practice.en: Create an Apache/PHP VM, a bucket with a public image, then a Cloud SQL MySQL instance. Connect the PHP app to Cloud SQL and display the bucket image.

fr: En production, ne stocke pas les mots de passe dans index.php: utilise Secret Manager.
Pour un lab, note toujours l'IP externe de la VM et l'IP publique Cloud SQL.
en: In production, do not store passwords in index.php: use Secret Manager.
For a lab, always note the VM external IP and the Cloud SQL public IP.

question.fr: Dans Google Cloud, quelle ressource est globale tandis que ses sous-reseaux sont regionaux ?
question.en: In Google Cloud, which resource is global while its subnets are regional?

fr: Cloud SQL
VPC
Zone
Cloud Storage object
en: Cloud SQL
VPC
Zone
Cloud Storage object

explanation.fr: Le VPC est global. Les subnets appartiennent a une region.
explanation.en: The VPC is global. Subnets belong to a region.

question.fr: Quel role IAM est le plus large ?
question.en: Which IAM role type is the broadest?

fr: Custom role
Predefined role
Basic role
Service account key
en: Custom role
Predefined role
Basic role
Service account key

explanation.fr: Les roles basic comme Owner, Editor et Viewer sont tres larges.
explanation.en: Basic roles such as Owner, Editor, and Viewer are very broad.

question.fr: Quel service est adapte au stockage objet durable et hautement disponible ?
question.en: Which service is suited for durable and highly available object storage?

fr: Cloud Storage
Cloud SQL
Compute Engine
Cloud NAT
en: Cloud Storage
Cloud SQL
Compute Engine
Cloud NAT

explanation.fr: Cloud Storage stocke des objets: images, backups, fichiers, archives et datasets.
explanation.en: Cloud Storage stores objects: images, backups, files, archives, and datasets.

goal.fr: Savoir concevoir des flux applicatifs: firewall, GKE, Cloud Run, load balancing, DNS, CDN et acces securise.
goal.en: Design application traffic flows: firewall, GKE, Cloud Run, load balancing, DNS, CDN, and secure access.

summary.fr: Pour les microservices sur VM, les firewall rules peuvent cibler des service accounts. C'est plus robuste que des tags ou des IP quand tu veux autoriser MS1 vers MS2, MS2 vers MS3 et rien d'autre. Les regles ingress definissent source, target, protocole, port, action et priorite.
summary.en: For VM-based microservices, firewall rules can target service accounts. This is more robust than tags or IPs when you want to allow MS1 to MS2, MS2 to MS3, and nothing else. Ingress rules define source, target, protocol, port, action, and priority.

fr: Service account = identite de workload pour les VM.
Les network tags sont utiles mais moins forts comme modele d'identite.
Les regles deny/allow sont evaluees selon leur priorite.
Une regle trop large avec source CIDR du subnet autorise plus de trafic que necessaire.
en: Service account = workload identity for VMs.
Network tags are useful but weaker as an identity model.
Deny/allow rules are evaluated by priority.
A broad source subnet CIDR allows more traffic than necessary.

practice.fr: Cree trois service accounts S1, S2, S3 et trois regles ingress: S1 vers S2 tcp:8443, S2 vers S3 tcp:8663, S3 vers S1 tcp:8883.
practice.en: Create three service accounts S1, S2, S3 and three ingress rules: S1 to S2 tcp:8443, S2 to S3 tcp:8663, S3 to S1 tcp:8883.

fr: Pense en flux: qui initie la connexion, qui la recoit, quel port est ecoute.
Pour auditer, lis le nom de la regle dans les firewall logs.
en: Think in flows: who initiates, who receives, which port is listening.
For audit, read the rule name in firewall logs.

title.fr: Load Balancing, CDN et DNS publics
title.en: Load Balancing, CDN, and Public DNS

summary.fr: Un Application Load Balancer global externe gere HTTP/HTTPS avec anycast. Pour rediriger HTTP vers HTTPS, on utilise deux forwarding rules et deux target proxies: un pour la redirection HTTP sans backend, un pour HTTPS avec URL map. Les fichiers statiques peuvent aller vers un backend bucket et les API dynamiques vers un backend service. Cloud CDN cache le contenu pres des utilisateurs.
summary.en: A global external Application Load Balancer handles HTTP/HTTPS with anycast. To redirect HTTP to HTTPS, use two forwarding rules and two target proxies: one HTTP redirect without backend, one HTTPS proxy with a URL map. Static files can route to a backend bucket and dynamic APIs to a backend service. Cloud CDN caches content near users.

fr: L7 HTTP/HTTPS = Application Load Balancer.
TCP non HTTP avec conservation IP client = regional external passthrough Network Load Balancer.
Backend bucket Cloud CDN journalise les cache hits/misses par defaut dans le contexte du lab.
DNSSEC protege contre le spoofing DNS et le cache poisoning.
en: L7 HTTP/HTTPS = Application Load Balancer.
Non-HTTP TCP with original client IP = regional external passthrough Network Load Balancer.
Backend bucket Cloud CDN logs cache hits/misses by default in the lab context.
DNSSEC protects against DNS spoofing and cache poisoning.

practice.fr: Dessine une architecture avec un domaine unique, /static vers backend bucket, /api vers backend service, redirection HTTP vers HTTPS et Cloud CDN active.
practice.en: Draw an architecture with one domain, /static to backend bucket, /api to backend service, HTTP to HTTPS redirect, and Cloud CDN enabled.

fr: Pour Signed URLs avec Cloud CDN, invalide le cache par chemin sans les query parameters.
Pour index.html qui reference des assets versionnes, evite le cache agressif.
en: For Signed URLs with Cloud CDN, invalidate cache by path without query parameters.
For index.html referencing versioned assets, avoid aggressive caching.

summary.fr: GKE utilise des ressources Compute Engine pour ses noeuds. Un pod Kubernetes est un groupe d'un ou plusieurs conteneurs. Pour le container-native load balancing, GKE expose des pods via zonal Network Endpoint Groups. Cloud Run est adapte aux applications conteneurisees completes; Cloud Run functions est adapte au code evenementiel sans provisionner de serveurs.
summary.en: GKE uses Compute Engine resources for its nodes. A Kubernetes pod is a group of one or more containers. For container-native load balancing, GKE exposes pods via zonal Network Endpoint Groups. Cloud Run suits complete containerized apps; Cloud Run functions suit event-driven code without provisioning servers.

fr: Pod = groupe de conteneurs, pas groupe de VM.
GKE nodes = VM Compute Engine.
Horizontal Pod Autoscaler ajuste le nombre de pods selon des metriques.
Cloud Run functions s'integre avec Cloud Logging et les evenements.
en: Pod = group of containers, not group of VMs.
GKE nodes = Compute Engine VMs.
Horizontal Pod Autoscaler adjusts pod count based on metrics.
Cloud Run functions integrates with Cloud Logging and events.

practice.fr: Compare trois cas: fonction declenchee par upload Storage, API web conteneurisee Cloud Run, frontend GKE expose via NEG et HPA.
practice.en: Compare three cases: Storage upload triggered function, containerized Cloud Run API, GKE frontend exposed by NEG and HPA.

fr: Si tu deploies une vraie application web dynamique, pense Cloud Run plutot que fonction.
Si le declencheur est un evenement court, pense Cloud Run functions.
en: For a real dynamic web app, think Cloud Run rather than a function.
For a short event trigger, think Cloud Run functions.

question.fr: Quel composant GKE supporte le container-native load balancing vers les pods ?
question.en: Which GKE component supports container-native load balancing to pods?

fr: Managed instance group seulement
Zonal Network Endpoint Group
Cloud NAT
Cloud DNS peering zone
en: Managed instance group only
Zonal Network Endpoint Group
Cloud NAT
Cloud DNS peering zone

explanation.fr: Les zonal NEGs permettent au load balancer de cibler directement les pods.
explanation.en: Zonal NEGs let the load balancer target pods directly.

question.fr: Quel service protege un domaine public contre DNS spoofing et cache poisoning ?
question.en: Which mechanism protects a public domain from DNS spoofing and cache poisoning?

fr: DNSSEC
Cloud NAT
VPC Flow Logs
Cloud Armor rate limiting
en: DNSSEC
Cloud NAT
VPC Flow Logs
Cloud Armor rate limiting

explanation.fr: DNSSEC signe la zone DNS; il faut aussi publier le DS record chez le registrar.
explanation.en: DNSSEC signs the DNS zone; you also publish the DS record at the registrar.

question.fr: Pour controler l'acces egress de VM privees vers un FQDN specifique, quel service est le plus adapte ?
question.en: To control private VM egress to a specific FQDN, which service is best suited?

fr: Cloud Armor
Secure Web Proxy
Cloud DNS public zone
Cloud CDN
en: Cloud Armor
Secure Web Proxy
Cloud DNS public zone
Cloud CDN

explanation.fr: Secure Web Proxy peut autoriser un FQDN comme update.vendor-a.com et refuser le reste.
explanation.en: Secure Web Proxy can allow an FQDN such as update.vendor-a.com and deny everything else.

goal.fr: Concevoir des architectures hybrides fiables: VPN HA, Interconnect, DNS hybride, monitoring, logs et tests de connectivite.
goal.en: Design reliable hybrid architectures: HA VPN, Interconnect, hybrid DNS, monitoring, logs, and connectivity tests.

summary.fr: Classic VPN peut utiliser du routage statique et policy-based quand un ancien equipement ne supporte pas BGP. HA VPN utilise Cloud Router et BGP pour la haute disponibilite. Partner Interconnect fournit une connectivite privee via un partenaire. En Layer 2, la session BGP est etablie entre le routeur on-premises et Cloud Router; l'ASN doit etre correct.
summary.en: Classic VPN can use static and policy-based routing when older equipment does not support BGP. HA VPN uses Cloud Router and BGP for high availability. Partner Interconnect provides private connectivity through a partner. In Layer 2, BGP is established between the on-prem router and Cloud Router; the ASN must be correct.

fr: HA VPN 99.99% vers un peer on-premises necessite au minimum deux tunnels.
Si un tunnel policy-based est up mais certains subnets ne passent pas, verifie local/remote traffic selectors.
Pour Partner Interconnect Layer 2, verifie ASN et session BGP.
Dedicated Interconnect offre un SLA si la redondance est correctement configuree.
en: HA VPN 99.99% to an on-prem peer needs at least two tunnels.
If a policy-based tunnel is up but some subnets fail, check local/remote traffic selectors.
For Layer 2 Partner Interconnect, check ASN and BGP session.
Dedicated Interconnect offers an SLA when redundancy is correctly configured.

practice.fr: Documente trois schemas: Classic VPN policy-based sans BGP, HA VPN avec deux tunnels, Partner Interconnect Layer 2 avec Cloud Router.
practice.en: Document three designs: Classic VPN policy-based without BGP, HA VPN with two tunnels, Layer 2 Partner Interconnect with Cloud Router.

fr: Quand BGP ne se cree pas, commence par peer IP, ASN, interface VLAN et Cloud Router.
Quand BGP marche mais les routes manquent, verifie les advertised routes.
en: When BGP does not form, start with peer IP, ASN, VLAN attachment, and Cloud Router.
When BGP works but routes are missing, check advertised routes.

summary.fr: Cloud DNS peut servir des zones publiques, des zones privees, des forwarding zones et des peering zones. Pour cymbalbank.com public, il faut une public managed zone. Pour gcp.cymbalbank.com prive dans Google Cloud, il faut une private managed zone. Pour corp.cymbalbank.com autoritatif on-premises, il faut une forwarding zone vers le DNS on-premises.
summary.en: Cloud DNS can serve public zones, private zones, forwarding zones, and peering zones. For public cymbalbank.com, use a public managed zone. For private gcp.cymbalbank.com in Google Cloud, use a private managed zone. For corp.cymbalbank.com authoritative on-premises, use a forwarding zone to on-prem DNS.

fr: Inbound DNS policy permet a on-premises de resoudre des noms internes Google Cloud.
Outbound DNS policy/forwarding zone permet au VPC de resoudre des noms on-premises.
Pour plusieurs VPC, centraliser une forwarding zone et utiliser des DNS peering zones reduit la duplication.
Une seule zone ne peut pas etre a la fois publique, privee et forwarding pour des domaines differents.
en: Inbound DNS policy lets on-prem resolve Google Cloud internal names.
Outbound DNS policy/forwarding zone lets VPC resolve on-prem names.
For multiple VPCs, centralize one forwarding zone and use DNS peering zones to reduce duplication.
One zone cannot simultaneously be public, private, and forwarding for different domains.

practice.fr: Cree un plan DNS avec trois zones: public cymbalbank.com, private gcp.cymbalbank.com, forwarding corp.cymbalbank.com.
practice.en: Create a DNS plan with three zones: public cymbalbank.com, private gcp.cymbalbank.com, forwarding corp.cymbalbank.com.

fr: Toujours identifier qui est autoritatif pour chaque suffixe DNS.
DNS peering ne transporte pas le trafic applicatif; il sert a la resolution DNS.
en: Always identify who is authoritative for each DNS suffix.
DNS peering does not carry application traffic; it is for DNS resolution.

summary.fr: Network Intelligence Center aide a diagnostiquer les flux avec Connectivity Tests, Network Topology et Flow Analyzer. Cloud Monitoring alerte sur les metriques VPN/Interconnect. Cloud Audit Logs enregistre les appels API avec timestamps, identites et actions. VPC Flow Logs donne de la visibilite trafic au niveau subnet.
summary.en: Network Intelligence Center helps diagnose flows with Connectivity Tests, Network Topology, and Flow Analyzer. Cloud Monitoring alerts on VPN/Interconnect metrics. Cloud Audit Logs records API calls with timestamps, identities, and actions. VPC Flow Logs gives subnet-level traffic visibility.

fr: Connectivity Tests est le bon reflexe apres changement routes/firewall.
Pour bande passante VPN, surveille bytes et packets: le tunnel a des limites en debit et paquets par seconde.
Pour capturer 10% du trafic entrant subnet, sample rate 0.1 et filtre destination IP dans le subnet.
Cloud Audit Logs concerne les appels API; Cloud Logging est la plateforme de consultation.
en: Connectivity Tests is the right reflex after route/firewall changes.
For VPN bandwidth, monitor bytes and packets: tunnels have throughput and packets-per-second limits.
To capture 10% inbound subnet traffic, use sample rate 0.1 and destination IP in the subnet.
Cloud Audit Logs are API call logs; Cloud Logging is the viewing platform.

practice.fr: Simule un incident: VM1 ne joint pas VM2 apres une regle firewall. Lance Connectivity Tests puis lis la cause indiquee.
practice.en: Simulate an incident: VM1 cannot reach VM2 after a firewall rule. Run Connectivity Tests and read the reported cause.

fr: Ne supprime pas des routes au hasard: observe d'abord le chemin attendu.
Pour les logs Cloud CDN via backend bucket, retiens le comportement precise dans le lab: logging par defaut.
en: Do not randomly delete routes: first observe the expected path.
For Cloud CDN logs through backend bucket, remember the lab-specific behavior: default logging.

question.fr: Un tunnel Classic VPN policy-based est up, mais certains sous-reseaux ne passent pas. Quelle verification est prioritaire ?
question.en: A Classic VPN policy-based tunnel is up, but some subnets do not pass traffic. What should you check first?

fr: Cloud Router BGP status
Local and remote traffic selectors
Cloud CDN logs
Cloud Armor policy
en: Cloud Router BGP status
Local and remote traffic selectors
Cloud CDN logs
Cloud Armor policy

explanation.fr: Avec policy-based VPN, les traffic selectors controlent les plages autorisees dans le tunnel.
explanation.en: With policy-based VPN, traffic selectors control which ranges are allowed through the tunnel.

question.fr: Quel outil utiliser pour verifier un probleme entre deux VM apres modification de routes et firewall rules ?
question.en: Which tool should you use to verify a problem between two VMs after route and firewall changes?

fr: Connectivity Tests
Cloud CDN
Cloud NAT
Cloud SQL Insights
en: Connectivity Tests
Cloud CDN
Cloud NAT
Cloud SQL Insights

explanation.fr: Connectivity Tests identifie le chemin et l'endroit ou le trafic est bloque.
explanation.en: Connectivity Tests identifies the path and where traffic is blocked.

question.fr: Pour DNS hybride avec corp.cymbalbank.com autoritatif on-premises, quel composant Cloud DNS faut-il ?
question.en: For hybrid DNS with corp.cymbalbank.com authoritative on-premises, which Cloud DNS component is needed?

fr: Public managed zone
Forwarding zone
Backend bucket
Cloud Armor edge policy
en: Public managed zone
Forwarding zone
Backend bucket
Cloud Armor edge policy

explanation.fr: Une forwarding zone transfere les requetes pour ce domaine vers les serveurs DNS on-premises.
explanation.en: A forwarding zone forwards queries for that domain to on-premises DNS servers.

goal.fr: Maitriser la securite reseau, l'inspection, la protection edge, les politiques hierarchiques et les decisions d'architecture d'entreprise.
goal.en: Master network security, inspection, edge protection, hierarchical policies, and enterprise architecture decisions.

title.fr: Cloud Armor, WAF et protection edge
title.en: Cloud Armor, WAF, and Edge Protection

summary.fr: Google Cloud Armor protege les applications derriere Application Load Balancer contre DDoS L7, SQL injection, XSS et abus applicatifs. Pour une attaque brute-force venant d'IP valides avec volume anormal par utilisateur, une regle de rate limiting par IP client est plus adaptee qu'un blocage regional.
summary.en: Google Cloud Armor protects apps behind Application Load Balancer against L7 DDoS, SQL injection, XSS, and application abuse. For brute-force traffic from valid IPs with abnormal per-user volume, client-IP rate limiting is better than regional blocking.

fr: Cloud Armor = protection edge/WAF pour load balancers applicatifs.
Rate limiting preserve le trafic legitime faible volume.
Les regles WAF preconfigurees couvrent SQLi, XSS et autres signatures.
Cloud NAT ne protege pas une application entrante; il gere l'egress des VM privees.
en: Cloud Armor = edge/WAF protection for application load balancers.
Rate limiting preserves legitimate low-volume traffic.
Preconfigured WAF rules cover SQLi, XSS, and other signatures.
Cloud NAT does not protect inbound apps; it handles private VM egress.

practice.fr: Ecris une politique Cloud Armor: WAF SQLi/XSS, rate limiting login, deny geographique seulement si le besoin le justifie.
practice.en: Write a Cloud Armor policy: SQLi/XSS WAF, login rate limiting, geographic deny only when justified.

fr: Blocage trop large = risque de bloquer de vrais utilisateurs.
Lis les logs avant de durcir une regle WAF.
en: Broad blocking risks blocking real users.
Read logs before tightening a WAF rule.

summary.fr: Cloud NAT donne un acces Internet sortant aux VM privees sans IP publique. Il faut dimensionner les ports NAT: 500 VM x 1000 connexions = 500 000 ports, soit environ 8 IP NAT si 64 000 ports par IP. Pour inspection deep packet managed, Cloud IDS fournit des signatures sans gerer de collecteurs. Packet Mirroring vers des appliances tierces est possible mais demande plus d'operations.
summary.en: Cloud NAT gives outbound internet access to private VMs without public IPs. NAT ports must be sized: 500 VMs x 1000 connections = 500,000 ports, about 8 NAT IPs at 64,000 ports per IP. For managed deep packet inspection, Cloud IDS provides signatures without collector management. Packet Mirroring to third-party appliances is possible but more operational.

fr: Cloud NAT ne permet pas d'entree Internet vers les VM.
Secure Web Proxy controle egress par FQDN/URL.
Packet Mirroring necessite policy, internal passthrough NLB, instance group de collecteurs et firewall rules.
Cloud IDS detecte malware et command-and-control avec signatures managees.
en: Cloud NAT does not allow inbound internet to VMs.
Secure Web Proxy controls egress by FQDN/URL.
Packet Mirroring needs policy, internal passthrough NLB, collector instance group, and firewall rules.
Cloud IDS detects malware and command-and-control with managed signatures.

practice.fr: Calcule les ports NAT pour plusieurs tailles de fleet, puis choisis entre Cloud IDS et Packet Mirroring selon le niveau d'operation accepte.
practice.en: Calculate NAT ports for multiple fleet sizes, then choose between Cloud IDS and Packet Mirroring based on acceptable operations.

fr: NAT = connectivite; proxy = controle FQDN; IDS = detection; firewall = filtrage L3/L4.
Ne confonds pas inspection de trafic et metadata Flow Logs.
en: NAT = connectivity; proxy = FQDN control; IDS = detection; firewall = L3/L4 filtering.
Do not confuse traffic inspection with Flow Logs metadata.

summary.fr: Les hierarchical firewall policies appliquent des regles au niveau organization ou folder pour plusieurs projets/VPC. Pour bloquer SSH public sur tous les projets d'un folder Banking-Prod sans que les admins projet puissent contourner, applique une policy au folder avec une regle deny ingress tcp:22 a priorite haute. Evite l'organisation si le besoin ne concerne qu'un folder.
summary.en: Hierarchical firewall policies apply rules at organization or folder level across projects/VPCs. To block public SSH across all projects in a Banking-Prod folder without project admins overriding it, apply a folder policy with a high-priority deny ingress tcp:22 rule. Avoid organization level if the need is only one folder.

fr: Least administrative effort = appliquer au bon niveau de hierarchy.
Plus petit numero de priorite = priorite plus haute.
goto_next delegue au niveau suivant; ce n'est pas un blocage ferme.
Les regles VPC locales peuvent etre insuffisantes si les admins projet peuvent les modifier.
en: Least administrative effort = apply at the correct hierarchy level.
Lower priority number = higher priority.
goto_next delegates to the next level; it is not a firm block.
Local VPC rules may be insufficient if project admins can modify them.

practice.fr: Redige une policy folder qui bloque tcp:22 depuis 0.0.0.0/0 et explique pourquoi elle ne doit pas etre au niveau organization.
practice.en: Write a folder policy that blocks tcp:22 from 0.0.0.0/0 and explain why it should not be organization-wide.

fr: Gouvernance = appliquer uniformement sans casser les autres equipes.
Teste toujours l'impact sur health checks et acces administrateur legitime.
en: Governance = apply uniformly without breaking other teams.
Always test impact on health checks and legitimate admin access.

question.fr: Quelle solution managée fournit deep packet inspection avec signatures de menace sans gerer de collecteurs VM ?
question.en: Which managed solution provides deep packet inspection with threat signatures without managing collector VMs?

fr: Cloud IDS
VPC Flow Logs
Cloud NAT
Cloud DNS
en: Cloud IDS
VPC Flow Logs
Cloud NAT
Cloud DNS

explanation.fr: Cloud IDS est le service managé pour detection d'intrusion avec signatures.
explanation.en: Cloud IDS is the managed intrusion detection service with signatures.

question.fr: 500 VM avec 1000 connexions Internet chacune via Cloud NAT demandent combien d'IP NAT environ ?
question.en: 500 VMs with 1000 internet connections each through Cloud NAT need about how many NAT IPs?

explanation.fr: 500 000 ports / environ 64 000 ports par IP = 7.8, donc 8 IP.
explanation.en: 500,000 ports / about 64,000 ports per IP = 7.8, so 8 IPs.

question.fr: Pour bloquer SSH public dans tous les projets d'un folder sans contournement local, quelle approche choisir ?
question.en: To block public SSH in all projects of a folder without local override, which approach should you choose?

fr: Regle VPC dans chaque projet
Policy hierarchique appliquee au folder avec deny tcp:22
Cloud NAT rule
DNS response policy
en: VPC rule in each project
Hierarchical policy applied to the folder with deny tcp:22
Cloud NAT rule
DNS response policy

explanation.fr: La policy hierarchique au folder applique uniformement la gouvernance et limite le contournement par les admins projet.
explanation.en: The folder-level hierarchical policy applies governance uniformly and limits override by project admins.

title.fr: Projet final: reseau bancaire hybride securise
title.en: Final Project: Secure Hybrid Banking Network

brief.fr: Conçois une architecture pour une banque fictive: site public global, portail interne, workloads GKE prives, connectivite on-premises, DNS hybride, CDN, protection Cloud Armor, NAT/Proxy egress, monitoring et tests de connectivite.
brief.en: Design an architecture for a fictional bank: global public site, internal portal, private GKE workloads, on-prem connectivity, hybrid DNS, CDN, Cloud Armor protection, NAT/Proxy egress, monitoring, and connectivity tests.

fr: Diagramme logique des VPC, subnets, load balancers, DNS et connexions hybrides.
Table des flux autorises avec source, destination, port, service account et justification.
Plan de monitoring: alertes VPN/Interconnect, Flow Logs, Audit Logs, Connectivity Tests.
Plan de securite: Cloud Armor, Cloud NAT, Secure Web Proxy, Cloud IDS, hierarchical firewall policies.
en: Logical diagram of VPCs, subnets, load balancers, DNS, and hybrid connections.
Allowed flow table with source, destination, port, service account, and justification.
Monitoring plan: VPN/Interconnect alerts, Flow Logs, Audit Logs, Connectivity Tests.
Security plan: Cloud Armor, Cloud NAT, Secure Web Proxy, Cloud IDS, hierarchical firewall policies.
